data.name: Burst Lightning
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

data.name: Crawling Barrens
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}: Put two +1/+1 counters on this land. Then you may have it become a 0/0 Elemental creature until end of turn. It's still a land.

data.name: Dawnwing Marshal
data.oracle_text:
Flying
{4}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "Horizon to horizon, mountain to sea. Everything within is ours to protect."

data.name: Divine Resilience
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {2}{W} (You may pay an additional {2}{W} as you cast this spell.)
Target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, instead any number of target creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy them.)

data.name: Gatekeeper of Malakir
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, target player sacrifices a creature of their choice.
data.flavor_text: "You may enter the city—once the toll is paid."

data.name: Gnarlid Colony
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {2}{G} (You may pay an additional {2}{G} as you cast this spell.)
If this creature was kicked, it enters with two +1/+1 counters on it.
Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has trample. (It can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)

data.name: Grow from the Ashes
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.)
Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If this spell was kicked, instead search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.name: Ingenious Leonin
data.oracle_text: {3}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target attacking creature you control. If that creature is a Cat, it gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: Leonin claws were already deadly weapons of natural evolution before he improved upon them.

data.name: Into the Roil
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.)
Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: In theory, the death of the Eldrazi should have stilled the Roil. It did not.

data.name: Jazal Goldmane
data.oracle_text:
First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
{3}{W}{W}: Attacking creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of attacking creatures.

data.name: Lathliss, Dragon Queen
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever another nontoken Dragon you control enters, create a 5/5 red Dragon creature token with flying.
{1}{R}: Dragons you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

data.name: Maze's End
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}, Return this land to its owner's hand: Search your library for a Gate card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If you control ten or more Gates with different names, you win the game.

data.name: Rite of Replication
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.)
Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

data.name: Rogue's Passage
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
data.flavor_text: Rumors quickly spread among thieves about a labyrinth without walls and a prize beyond all measures of worth.

data.name: Scavenging Ooze
data.oracle_text: {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: In nature, not a single bone or scrap of flesh goes to waste.

Flying

data.name: Sower of Chaos

data.flavor_text: After a few minutes in the cathar's attire, Vizrik started getting all kinds of new ideas.

Flying

"Any ship that sails on these mean seas for long is bound to pick up a ghost or two."
—Admiral Beckett Brass

data.name: Squad Rallier
data.oracle_text: {2}{W}: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with power 2 or less from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
data.flavor_text: Between the call of the bugler and the shrill squawk of her mount, not a soul slept through morning muster.

data.oracle_text:
Flying
{2}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
{X}: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value X whose controller was dealt combat damage by this creature this turn. Activate only once each turn.

Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)

data.name: Wildheart Invoker
data.oracle_text: {8}: Target creature gets +5/+5 and gains trample until end of turn. (It can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
data.flavor_text:
"Life as we know it dangles on the brink of extinction. We must show the strength they would steal from us."
—*The Invokers' Tales*
